productDisplayName: New Hide Men Canvas Multi Colour Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature canvas twill and leather belt from Newhide is all set to pump up your style. Pair it with classy formals or jeans and semi-formal shirts. Length: 117 cm Width: 3.5 cm Made of multi-coloured canvas twill with leather at the buckle and tongue for durability and style Buckle and holes to customise Fit Brand name embossed on the tail Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
